body: scripts/gittoc_lib/tracker.py is 1238 lines and triggers pylint's too-many-lines warning (C0302, default threshold 1000). The module already mixes: worktree bootstrap, version/migration logic, remote sync, event-log handling, CRUD, readiness, and the ~250-line fsck scanner. The fsck logic is the most self-contained piece and has a natural home alongside the existing integrity.py (which already defines IntegrityFinding/IntegrityReport). Move Tracker.fsck plus its private helpers (_validate_event_file, _canonical_cycle, _finding) into integrity.py or a new fsck.py, keeping Tracker.fsck as a thin wrapper. Preserves the public API while dropping tracker.py below the threshold.
title: tracker.py exceeds pylint too-many-lines threshold (1238 lines)
